profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Djasa Ubersakti Tbk engages in the construction of residential buildings in Indonesia. It operates through the Construction Services and Sales Of Landed House segments. The company is also involved in the ownership and leasing of real estate; and large-scale trade of machinery, equipment, and other equipment, as well as building materials. PT Djasa Ubersakti Tbk was founded in 1971 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.
